_comment: Curated 'where to watch' mapping. Edit freely. Keys are matched case-insensitively against competition names using includes(), so partial matches work (e.g. 'Bank of Ireland Schools Senior Cup' matches the 'Schools Senior Cup' key).

Six Nations.note: Free with an Irish/UK IP. Coverage split across broadcasters by match.

Rugby World Cup.note: Free coverage in IRE/UK during the tournament.

URC.note: TG4 streams chosen Irish-province matches free. Most others on Premier Sports (included with Sky Signature add-on).

Schools Senior Cup.note: Most rounds are streamed free on Leinster Rugby's YouTube; finals usually on TG4.

Schools.note: Generic schools fallback — match streamed on Leinster Rugby YouTube if covered.

Metro Invitational.note: Local Dublin youth tournament — usually no public stream; check the host club's social channels.

School Youth.note: Leinster School Youth — finals are sometimes streamed on Leinster Rugby YouTube.

AIL.note: Energia All-Ireland League — selected matches on Premier Sports.

Dublin Club.note: Local club rugby — check the host club's social media for any stream.

_default.note: Check local listings or the competition's official site.
